title: Russian Management Company Application — Header and Addressee Format
excerpt: How to write a Russian management company or HOA application header: "Кому" in dative case, "От кого" in genitive case, ready templates for property owners.
content:
# Russian Management Company Application — Header and Addressee Format

[Open the Addressee Generator →](/en/generator-adresata/?scenario=application&focus=to&source=article&article=management-company-application)

A Russian management company or homeowners association (HOA/TJS) application is a formal letter from a property owner or tenant regarding building maintenance and repair issues. The header follows standard Russian business letter format.

## The Application Header

Header structure:

1. **"Кому"** (To) — recipient (director or chairman)
2. **"От кого"** (From) — sender (owner or tenant)
3. **Date**

### Who Goes in the "To" Field

The "Кому" line is always in the dative case:

- `Директору ОOO "[management company name]" [full name]`
- `Председателю ТСЖ "[name]" [full name]`
- `Руководителю OOO "[name]" [full name]`

Example for a management company director:
```
Директору OOO "UK Dom-Servis"
Pavlova Elena Alexandrovna
```

Example for an HOA chairman:
```
Председателю ТСЖ "Our Home"
Krasnikov Dmitry Sergeevich
```

## Header Template

```
Директору OOO "UK Dom-Servis"
Pavlova Elena Alexandrovna

From the owner of apartment No. 47
at: Moscow, Sadovaya Street, bld. 12
Smirnova Anastasia Viktorovna

                                          15 May 2026
```

## Common Mistakes

1. **Wrong case** — "Директору" (dative) vs "Директора" (accusative). Always use dative: "Директору", "Председателю".
2. **Informal company name** — "Управляющей компании" instead of the official name from the contract.
3. **Extra preposition** — "На имя директора" instead of just "Директору".

## Checklist

- [ ] "Кому" — dative case
- [ ] "От кого" — genitive case
- [ ] Management company / HOA name matches founding documents
- [ ] Date is right-aligned

## Online Generator

To format a management company application header without errors — use the generator. Select "Organization Director" scenario and the system will fill in the correct forms.

[Open the Generator →](/en/generator-adresata/?scenario=application&focus=to&source=article&article=management-company-application)

Note: The generator provides standard grammatical forms based on common patterns. For specific company names, verify the final result or use a Russian grammar reference for unusual cases.
